upcoming.title: Coming soon
upcoming.subtitle: What I'm currently working on
upcoming.p1_desc: Showcase website for a pastry and culinary lab in Bordeaux — Next.js · TypeScript · Supabase · EmailJS · SCSS BEM · Vercel — Secure admin interface (JWT, RLS, rate limiting)
upcoming.p2_desc: Creating a showcase site for a photographer in order to show his art.
upcoming.p3_desc: Creating a full tower defense game inspired by FTL and Mindustry.
upcoming.p4_desc: Development of an all-in-one mobile party game with general knowledge, calculations, and visuals — Tauri v2 · Rust · SQLite · HTML/CSS/JS — Quiz, Drawing, Photo, Math · iOS & Android · FR/EN
